chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1639 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7023/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 3. For orders on CMA No.7024/2023 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of main case 14.11.2023 Mr. Muhammad Shakeel Lakho, Advocate for petitioner..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2 to 4. Petitioner claims to be daughter of late Ghulam Jaffar Khan Talpur, and further states that respondent No.8 in league with Revenue officials has got the land of his father in Deh Hamid Jagir, Taluka Garhi Yasin, District Shikarpur mutated in his favour. In such a backdrop she has filed this petition seeking directions to respondents to initiate enquiry against Revenue officials, who should produce the entire Revenue record of her father etc. We have heard learned Counsel for petitioner. He has not been able to satisfy as to maintainability of this petition and the reason as to why he has not approached the Revenue authorities first for seeking redressal of his grievance. Hence, this petition being non-maintainable is accordingly dismissed in limine along with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
